title: [Apache Flink 1.11.2 Released](</2020/09/17/apache-flink-1.11.2-released/>)
summary:
#  Apache Flink 1.11.2 Released
September 17, 2020 - Zhu Zhu (@zhuzhv)
The Apache Flink community released the second bugfix version of the Apache Flink 1.11 series.
This release includes 96 fixes and minor improvements for Flink 1.11.1. Th…
